Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json, copy

with open\('/Users/biuser/project/n8n_TI/threat_intelligence_analysis.ipynb'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

cell6 = nb['cells'][6]
src = ''.join\(cell6['source']\)

GUARD = """\\
# =============================================================================
# ENVIRONMENT GUARD — initializes Colab globals if cell-2 was skipped
# =============================================================================
if 'AI_AVAILABLE' not in globals\(\):
    IN_COLAB      = False
    AI_AVAILABLE  = False
    DRIVE_MOUNTED = False
    colab_files   = None
    try:
        from google.colab import files as colab_files
        IN_COLAB = True
        try:
            from google.colab import ai
            AI_AVAILABLE = True
        except ImportError:
            pass
    except ImportError:
        pass
    if not AI_AVAILABLE:
        print\("[System] Warning: AI_AVAILABLE=False. "
              "Run cell-2 first, or ensure google.colab is available."\)

"""

OLD_TOP = \(
    "# =============================================================================\\n"
    "# INTERACTIVE CHAT INTERFACE FOR PESTLEM ANALYSIS\\n"
    "# =============================================================================\\n"
    "from ipywidgets import"
\)
NEW_TOP = \(
    "# =============================================================================\\n"
    "# INTERACTIVE CHAT INTERFACE FOR PESTLEM ANALYSIS\\n"
    "# =============================================================================\\n"
    + GUARD
    + "from ipywidgets import"
\)

if OLD_TOP not in src:
    print\("ERROR: old_string not found in cell-6!"\)
else:
    new_src = src.replace\(OLD_TOP, NEW_TOP, 1\)
    cell6['source'] = [new_src]
    with open\('/Users/biuser/project/n8n_TI/threat_intelligence_analysis.ipynb', 'w'\) as f:
        json.dump\(nb, f, indent=1, ensure_ascii=False\)
    print\(f"OK: cell-6 updated. New length: {len\(new_src\)} chars"\)
    # Verify
    idx = new_src.find\('AI_AVAILABLE'\)
    print\(f"First AI_AVAILABLE at char {idx}:"\)
    print\(new_src[idx-5:idx+80]\)
PYEOF)
